ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot mimicking the action of hooking something.  The robot will use its right arm to perform this action, while the left arm remains in a relaxed position. The movement will be a smooth arc, starting from a relaxed position, extending outward to hook something, and then returning to the relaxed position. This will be achieved by adjusting joint1 to control the arm's rotation and joint2 to control the arm's pitch. The wrist will also be adjusted slightly to enhance the hooking action. The sequence will consist of four frames to capture the start, extension, hook, and retraction of the arm.

frames.beat: both arms hang relaxed at the sides
right arm extends outward, ready to hook
right arm hooks with a sharp twist and slight lift
right arm retracts to the relaxed side position
